reference: Hello doctor, I have had a delayed period by three days. For the last few days, I have been experiencing a high temperature at certain times of the day, which eventually subsides. I feel a heaviness inside and have been getting headaches. I am unable to sit in certain positions, and I have food cravings. Am I pregnant?
text: Hello, doctor. I have had a delayed period by three days. For the last few days, I have been experiencing a high temperature at certain times of the day, which eventually subsides. I feel a heaviness inside and have been getting headaches. I am unable to sit in certain positions and I have food cravings. Am I pregnant?
